description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push and on pull requests. The workflow consists of two jobs: 'cache' and 'build-package'. The 'cache' job runs on ubuntu-24.04, gets the HEAD of the bootstrap-managarm repository, and caches the rootfs. The 'build-package' job uses a matrix strategy to build different packages on various architectures, installing prerequisites, restoring the cache, checking out the bootstrap-managarm and Managarm repositories, and building and testing the packages.
